UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Enterprise profile schema representing user carbon twin state, stats, companion details, and logs.

userId.description: The unique authenticated Firebase User ID.

onboarded.description: Whether the user completed the onboarding wizard.

challenges.description: Weekly status items tracking claimed challenges.

logs.description: Historical array of eco logged habits and items.

stats.description: Compiled and certified carbon footprint stats statistics.

conversations.description: Previous AI companion talk message exchanges.

twin_state.description: Historical mental and emotional track indexes of companion.

sustainability_scores.description: Historical carbon footprint score metrics tracker.

/users/{userId}.description: Secure storage directory mapping authentic user profile data to individual owners.
